testcase.name: switchToHindiTest

error.message: Unresolved compilation problems: Syntax error on token ".", @ expected after this token Syntax error, insert ")" to complete SingleMemberAnnotation Syntax error, insert "SimpleName" to complete QualifiedName Syntax error, insert "Identifier (" to complete MethodHeaderName Syntax error, insert ")" to complete MethodDeclaration
